channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: BYU gets shut down by #2 Houston, 74-54
item.description: KANSAS CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In the Big 12 Tournament quarterfinals, BYU scored 49 points in the first half against Iowa State. But in the semifinals against #2 Houston, BYU didn't eclipse the 49-point mark until there were three minutes left in the game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lewis Hamilton 8th in qualifying in Ferrari debut as Norris takes pole for F1 race in Australia
item.description: Lewis Hamilton qualified eighth-fastest in his Ferrari debut as McLaren’s Lando Norris claimed pole position for the Australian Grand Prix at Albert Park.
item.dc:creator: Stewart Bell, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ejiofor powers No. 6 St. John's past No. 25 Marquette 79-63 into 1st Big East final since 2000
item.description: Zuby Ejiofor scored a career-high 33 points, a St. John’s record in the Big East Tournament, and the sixth-ranked Red Storm pulled away from No. 25 Marquette 79-63 to reach the conference championship game for the first time in 25 years.
item.dc:creator: Mike Fitzpatrick, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: No. 1 Duke rules out Cooper Flagg and Maliq Brown with injuries for ACC semifinal vs. UNC
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Top-ranked Duke has ruled out Cooper Flagg and Maliq Brown for Friday night's game against rival North Carolina in the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament because of injuries.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tampa, Orlando line up to make pitch to bring Rays to their city
item.description: The development deal to build the Tampa Bay Rays a new stadium in St. Petersburg appears to be dead. Now, other groups are lining up to buy the team and take it to another city.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Michigan votes to urge ban on trans athletes against girls; Dems get backlash from LGBTQ+ advocates
item.description: Eight Michigan Democrats voted to urge a ban on trans athletes against girls in high school sports, resulting in backlash from LGBTQ+ advocates.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stephen Curry becomes first player in NBA history to make 4,000 3-pointers
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry's shooting range and accuracy from way back have long stood alone — whether with a defender or two in his face or when letting it fly from the logo.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rory McIlroy took college golfer's phone after heckling moment at the Players Championship
item.description: University of Texas golfer Luke Potter was the man involved in a heckling moment with Rory McIlroy during a practice round at the Players Championship, which went viral.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caitlin Clark jokingly trolls Fever teammate Lexie Hull ahead of Unrivaled game
item.description: Caitlin Clark and Lexie Hull developed on-court chemistry during their first season together, but the Indiana Fever duo appear to be in sync even when they're not on the hardwood.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sean McVay's custom highlight tapes of Davante Adams helped lure the WR to Rams
item.description: Sean McVay has long eyed bringing Davante Adams to Los Angeles, so when Adams became available this offseason, the Rams coach didn't let him slip away.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: USF Women's Basketball going to NCAA Tournament
item.description: No. 3 South Florida (23-10) defeated No. 9 Rice (17-17), 69-62, in the 2025 American Women’s Basketball Championship final on Wednesday evening, March 12, at Dickies Arena in Fort Worth, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rays 'cannot move forward' with new ballpark deal, owner says
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays will not be getting a new stadium in St. Petersburg under the existing deal, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The 49ers agree to a 2-year contract with QB Mac Jones, AP source says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Quarterback Mac Jones will finally join the San Francisco 49ers four years after the team nearly drafted him third overall.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Friendly Freshmen; Aztecs Basketball Pharaoh Compton and Taj DeGourville hold lifelong bond
item.description: Aztecs freshmen-duo Pharaoh Compton and Taj Degourville's friendship goes back longer than you think.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Utes knocked out of Big 12 Tournament by UCF
item.description: KANSAS CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a tumultuous season for the Runnin' Utes, and it most likely came to an end Tuesday night with an 87-72 loss to UCF in the first round of the Big 12 Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Rugby: Cathedral Catholic 28, La Costa Canyon 17
item.description:
The High School Boys Rugby Championship was held in Del Mar as the Cathedral Catholic Dons hosted the La Costa Canyon Mavericks.
It was the Dons who came out victorious, defeated La Costa Canyon by a score of 28-17, to win their 5th straight Rugby Championship.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Warriors star Stephen Curry reaches 25,000 career points
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry became the 26th player in NBA history to score 25,000 career points, reaching the milestone during the third quarter of the Golden State Warriors' 115-110 victory over the Detroit Pistons on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: RSL gives up two stoppage time goals in 3-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After jumping out to an early lead, Real Salt Lake allowed three straight goals, two in stoppage time, and loses in its first meeting with San Diego FC Saturday night at America First Field, 3-1.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chiefs WR Xavier Worthy released after prosecutor declines charges
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Xavier Worthy was released Saturday after a district attorney in Texas declined to pursue charges against the Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver following an arrest in which he had been accused of felony domestic violence.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Aggies dominate Air Force in regular season finale
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Mason Falslev scored 18 points on 8-of-10 shooting to lead the Utah State basketball team to a dominating 87-47 win over Air Force. The Aggies had lost two in a row for the first time all year, but gave their fans plenty to cheer about in their home finale.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake aims to keep winning as San Diego FC visits for the first time
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns to action at America First Field on Saturday night, facing MLS expansion side San Diego FC for the first time. Coming off a commanding 2-0 win over Seattle last weekend, RSL looks to build momentum and keep their shutout streak alive in front of their raucous home crowd.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Trump will lead task force preparing for 2026 World Cup
item.description: President Donald Trump has created a task force to prepare for the 2026 World Cup, which will bring the globe's premier soccer tournament to North America at a time when his on-again, off-again tariffs have ratcheted up tensions across the continent.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN J. COOPER, Associated Press, Fox 5
